global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various shapes and text elements promoting an offer.
global.main_message: Promoting exclusive new hits available tonight.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: MoonScreen logo
elements.description: A rounded rectangle with the text 'MoonScreen' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping circular shapes in a lighter blue shade, adding visual interest to the center of the ad.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape in the center, contrasting with the circular elements, also in a lighter blue shade.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular element positioned near the bottom center of the ad, likely decorative.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly above it.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'Exclusive tonight New hits every week' in a large, bold font, centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: Exclusive tonight New hits every week

elements.label: UGC text
elements.description: The text 'UGC' in a small font, positioned in the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Get offer' in a bold font, centered at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold colors, promoting exclusive new hits.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight New hits every week, MoonScreen, Get offer, UGC
